name: Opaloid Kingdom
short_description: Take control of a sorcerer in a medieval fantasy land! Explore dark dungeons filled with monsters, travel through new towns and meet crazy wizards while fighting through obstacles that will test your skill through old-school arcade challenges
detailed_description:
Explore the Opaloid Kingdom and take control of a sorcerer sent on a mission to rescue the princess!

Play through fast, minimalistic, old-school arcade challenges in a medieval fantasy land! Explore dark dungeons filled with monsters, travel through new towns and meet crazy wizards while fighting through obstacles that will test your skill.

  • Carefully crafted retro aesthetic, including a CRT filter for old-school visual delight.

  • Overwhelmed by slow games with multiple story choices at every turn? Enjoy an experience based on quick, satisfying gameplay.

  • A wonderful chiptune soundtrack based on authentic medieval songs.

  • Minimalist user interface, no cluttered numbers or text covering up the gameplay.

  • This game is inspired by old-school RPGs but it is an action game based on skill.

  • Play with gamepad or keyboard, both work perfectly.

Like a cozy medieval fantasy tale, Opaloid Kingdom tells the story of two mages.

The first one is the Azure Sorcerer that lives a simple life in Azure river town, growing herbs, foraging mushrooms, helping the villagers with the harvest and a little rain once in a while thanks to his water magic.

His calm lifestyle gets interrupted when the King summons him to the castle with a request that might put his life in danger.

The Crazy Wizard, a mage that lives in a fortress and used to serve the king as an advisor and ally is now the enemy of the whole crown, he lives in his secluded fortress where his monstrous pets keep him company, along with a whole company of dungeon gnomes which have built their own town inside and recognize the Crazy Wizard as his liege.
